title: The Palace Resort
description: A comprehensive management system for high-end luxury resorts, featuring automated booking engines, staff coordination modules, and real-time inventory tracking. Designed to streamline operations and enhance the guest experience through seamless digital integration.

title: Meetup
description: A modern mobile-first e-commerce solution focusing on high conversion rates and intuitive user journeys. Features include AR product previews, biometric checkout, and personalized AI recommendations.

title: Real Estate Hub
description: An all-in-one platform connecting property buyers, sellers, and agents with advanced filtering and virtual tour capabilities. Built for scalability and high-performance data handling.

title: AI Saas Landing
description: A high-converting landing page for an AI-powered SaaS product, utilizing cutting-edge animations and interactive demos to showcase complex technical features simply.
